name: Meadow Bell
description: Distant cowbell across a sunlit alpine meadow

prompts.label: distant cowbell ringing across sunlit alpine meadow
prompts.text: distant cowbell ringing across sunlit alpine meadow, forest clearing at dawn, wooden mallet on hollow log, morning dew stillness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, with natural decay

prompts.text: pastoral bell tone carried on warm grass-scented wind, moss-covered stone garden, rain droplet on broad leaf, sun-warmed earth, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, smooth fade out

prompts.label: gentle copper bell with mountain echo decay
prompts.text: gentle copper bell with mountain echo decay, bamboo grove in gentle wind, smooth river stones clinking, birdsong tranquility, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, sustained resonance
